message:
feat: 100K-1M row benchmarks, Iceberg support, fix master-do broadcast

- Fix BigInt serialization crash in master-do broadcast (add bigIntReplacer)
- Fix table name extraction for .parquet files (was only stripping .lance)
- Add generate-bench-data.ts: creates 100K×3col, 100K×2col, 1M×2col Parquet + Iceberg table
- Rewrite seed-local-r2.ts to handle Lance, Parquet, generated data, and Iceberg
- Rewrite bench.ts with real benchmarks (100K-1M Parquet, Lance, Iceberg)
